Operation.xpath:
Defs/ThoughtDef[ defName="SleepDisturbed" or defName="CryingBaby" or defName="MyCryingBaby" or
defName="MySonDied" or defName="MySisterDied" or defName="MyHusbandDied" or defName="MyWifeDied" or defName="MyFianceDied" or defName="MyFianceeDied" or defName="MyLoverDied" or defName="MyBrotherDied" or defName="MyGrandchildDied" or defName="MyNieceDied" or defName="MyNephewDied" or defName="MyHalfSiblingDied" or defName="MyAuntDied" or defName="MyUncleDied" or defName="MyCousinDied" or defName="MyKinDied" or
defName="MySonLost" or defName="MySisterLost" or defName="MyHusbandLost" or defName="MyWifeLost" or defName="MyFianceLost" or defName="MyFianceeLost" or defName="MyLoverLost" or defName="MyBrotherLost" or defName="MyGrandchildLost" or defName="MyNieceLost" or defName="MyNephewLost" or defName="MyHalfSiblingLost" or defName="MyAuntLost" or defName="MyUncleLost" or defName="MyCousinLost" or defName="MyKinLost" ]
